qt: Which of the following describes alternation rank order?
op: Selecting best performer, then worst performer
Selectimg second best performer, then second worst performer

qt: A coach is said to be successful if he:
"Comprehensiveness" of an appraisal form is:
op: Addressing both past and future performance
Including all major areas of performance

qt: Which of the following are the major responsibilities of a coach?
Determining weightage of every aspect of performance provides which of the following advantages?
Which of the following appraisal technique is beneficial to assess the performance of leaders and managers?

op: Information on efficient attainment of goals
Information on effective attainment of goals

qt: Time Orientation in appraisal forms addresses_____________.
op: Aspects of both past and future performance

qt: Who among the following is responsible to provide verdict to the raised appeal against performance evaluation?

op: Peers are not well aware of the job responsibilities
Peer level evaluations are more costly to conduct
Peer level assessments cannot determine interpersonal coordination
Peer level biases are prominent in such appraisals

qt: For personal development of an employee sometimes a person is transferred to a different job position that requires different job skills not previously practiced by that employee. This type of activity for employee development is known as:
Performance evaluation method where employees are simply ranked from best to worst is called____________.
Which of the following performance appraisal method is relatively justifiable for employee's demotion/promotion decisions?
Halo error occurs during performance evaluation when:
op: Appraiser evaluates entire performance based on one particular dimension
Appraiser rates every employee as good performer
Appraiser rates every employee as bad performer

qt: Performance evaluation reports which are unstructured, open ended with high risk of evaluator's biasness, come under which of the following method?
Which of the following measures should be adopted to enhance the effectiveness of a 360 degree feedback method of performance evaluation?
op: Number of ratees should be high
Number of raters should be high

qt: Pilot testing is conducted before the implementation of PMS in order to:
op: Provide information about goals of PMS

qt: Conducting 360 degree feedback online has which of the following advantages?
op: It increases the chances of personal biasness

qt: Behavioral checklist includes all of the following features EXCEPT:
op: Focus is given on behaviors and results
Rater describes rather than evaluate behavior

qt: How employees react to negative feedback?
op: Employees openly accept it as it is for their betterment
Employees do not consider it critical to give importance
Employees require conclusive evidence for acceptance

op: Provide lesson to a rebellious employee
To make manager look good to his/her supervisor

qt: To address which of the following needs personal development plans are developed?
op: Train employees for hard skills only
Equip employees with soft skills only

qt: Supervisors over rate the employees in order to:
op: Provide lesson to a rebellious employee

qt: Which of the following coaching styles focuses more on emotions than facts?

Provides opportunity to employees to rate themselves
Performance is discussed from perspectives of both employee and supervisor
Rated performance is linked with the allocated salary

qt: Customers are not aware of the internal procedures of the organizations then why should they be considered as an important source of performance feedback?

It is inexpensive to evaluate performance through customer feedback
They can determine the quality of organization’s core outcome

Maintain strict monitoring of performance only

qt: Which of the following is not a comparative method of performance evaluation?

op: Information about individual tasks and responsibilities
Information about the goals of PMS

qt: The performance evaluation method where predefined quota for each category i.e. Best, Average and Worst established  is called___________________.

op: Manager should share ratings and ask employee to comment in a private location
Only employee is allowed to explain his/her self evaluation
Only manager is allowed to share performance ratings to employee

qt: Which of the following are monetary based rewards in response to employee performance?

op: Awarded on attaining company wide profits

qt: If information on employee performance is presented incorrectly by the evaluator then it leads to:

qt: Offering differences in pay structures based on gender, nationality and religion is an act of illegal practices and labeled as:

op: Competence that everyone needs to display
Competence that differentiates high performers from low performers

qt: Competence that everyone needs to display are termed as:

Which of the following is an example of differentiating competence?
Which of the following competence does not distinguish high and low performers?

op: Competence that everyone needs to display
Competence to do a job to a minimum level
